articles.title: Alexis Manyoma, Rafael Navarro rally Rapids to 4-1 victory over Galaxy
articles.original_title: Alexis Manyoma, Rafael Navarro rally Rapids to 4-1 victory over Galaxy
articles.summary: Alexis Manyoma netted the go-ahead score in the second half and Rafael Navarro added a pair of insurance goals, all after Los Angeles was forced to play a man down, helping the Colorado Rapids pull away for a 4-1 victory over the Galaxy on Saturday night.  João Klauss scored for the fourth time in his first three matches with the Galaxy to tie it 1-1 in the 56th minute.  Manyoma made his fifth career appearance and second this season when he subbed into the match in the 68th minute and scored hi

articles.title: Reynolds scores 21, winner to take Minnesota 67-66 past Northwestern
articles.original_title: Reynolds scores 21, winner to take Minnesota 67-66 past Northwestern
articles.summary: Langston Reynolds scored 21 points and scored the game-winning basket to lead Minnesota 67-66 past Northwestern in the final regular season game of the season for both Big Ten teams on Saturday.  Reynolds was 9 of 13 from the floor and scored the final four points over the last 26 seconds.  Cade Tyson had 15 points, while Isaac Asuma added 14 points and eight rebounds.

articles.title: Thunder grind past Warriors for a fifth straight win, 104-97 behind Gilgeous-Alexander
articles.original_title: Thunder grind past Warriors for a fifth straight win, 104-97 behind Gilgeous-Alexander
articles.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 27 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Golden State Warriors 104-97 on Saturday night for their fifth straight win.  Gilgeous-Alexander made just 6 of 15 field goals, but he made 14 of 15 free throws to maintain his usual production.  Oklahoma City is 5-0 since Gilgeous-Alexander returned from an abdominal strain.

articles.title: Dent erupts for 25 as UCLA crushes reeling USC 89-68 at Galen Center
articles.original_title: Dent erupts for 25 as UCLA crushes reeling USC 89-68 at Galen Center
articles.summary: Donovan Dent scored 25 points on 11-of-15 shooting and UCLA routed reeling Southern California 89-68 for the second time in 11 days Saturday to end the regular season with its highest-ever point total at Galen Center.  Dent and Eric Dailey Jr. combined to score UCLA's first 15 points of the second half.  Dent then ran off five in a row, extending the Bruins' lead to 72-47.

articles.title: Surridge scores 2 goal -- his 2nd multi-goal game this season -- as Nashville beats Minnesota 3-1
articles.original_title: Surridge scores 2 goal -- his 2nd multi-goal game this season -- as Nashville beats Minnesota 3-1
articles.summary: Sam Surridge scored two goals — his second multi-goal game this season — and Cristian Espinoza added a goal and an assist to help Nashville SC beat Minnesota United 3-1 on Saturday night.  Surridge has scored 17 home goals — the most in MLS — since the start of last season.  Surridge re-directed a shot by Patrick Yazbek into the net to open the scoring in the 26th minute and his rising shot from the right corner of the 6-yard box in the 47th made it 3-1.

articles.title: Sakamoto helps McKendree win team title at inaugural NCAA women's wrestling championship
articles.original_title: Sakamoto helps McKendree win team title at inaugural NCAA women's wrestling championship
articles.summary: CORALVILLE, Iowa (AP) — Yu Sakamoto beat Riley Rayome of North Central (IL) 4-3 to win the 117-pound crown and clinch the team title for McKendree on Saturday night at the inaugural NCAA women's wrestling championships. After a wild scramble in the final seconds, a challenge by North Central and a review, Sakamoto's win gave McKendree a 167-166 lead over Iowa — which finished with three individual champions and a runner-up, but had no remaining competitors with two matches remaining. articles.title: Tennessee State beats Morehead State 93-67, wins first OVC Tournament title since '94
articles.original_title: Tennessee State beats Morehead State 93-67, wins first OVC Tournament title since '94
articles.summary: EVANSVILLE, Ind. (AP) — Antoine Lorick III scored 18 points, and top-seeded Tennessee State beat No. 2 seed Morehead State 93-67 on Saturday night for the Tigers' first win in the Ohio Valley Conference Tournament championship game since 1994. Travis Harper II made five 3-pointers and finished with 17 points for Tennessee State (23-9), which shot 16 of 26 from long range. Dante Harris and Carlous Williams added 16 points apiece. articles.title: Brown, Pack combine for 44 points, lead Oklahoma 88-85 past Texas in OT
articles.original_title: Brown, Pack combine for 44 points, lead Oklahoma 88-85 past Texas in OT
articles.summary: Nijel Pack scored 23 points, Xzayvier Brown added 21 points, and Oklahoma beat Texas 88-85 in overtime in the final regular season game of the season for the two Southeastern Conference sides.  Pack was 7 of 14 from the field and 3 of 7 behind the arc.  Brown was 8-of-18 shooting with four steals and led with 12 in the first half.
